category_sources: source_facts.description says utilities for ext2, ext3, and ext4 file systems; official homepage says e2fsprogs provides Ext2/3/4 filesystem utilities: https://e2fsprogs.sourceforge.net/
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is e2fsprogs; official homepage title uses E2fsprogs: https://e2fsprogs.sourceforge.net/
docs_sources: Official homepage is the best official documentation surface found and links release notes and source information: https://e2fsprogs.sourceforge.net/
repo_sources: Official e2fsprogs homepage states latest development sources are maintained in the kernel.org Git repository git://git.kernel.org/pub/scm/fs/ext2/e2fsprogs.git: https://e2fsprogs.sourceforge.net/
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables list ext filesystem utilities; official homepage identifies Ext2/3/4 filesystem support: https://e2fsprogs.sourceforge.net/
